title: Dupe Key
description: This mod adds a key bind to dupe the mod is from 1.21-1.21.11
body:
Item Duper
Dupe items directly from a simple GUI — no commands needed.
Press K (configurable) to open the Item Duper menu. Hold any item in your main hand and click Dupe Item to instantly duplicate it into your inventory.
Features

🎮 Simple and clean GUI
⌨️ Keybind to open the menu (default: K)
📦 Copies full item data — including Shulker Box contents (Creative mode)
✅ Works in Creative mode (full NBT copy)
✅ Works in Survival/Adventure with OP permissions (via /give)
🔁 Compatible with Minecraft 1.21 – 1.21.11

How to use

Hold the item you want to duplicate in your main hand
Press K to open the menu
Click Dupe Item
Done!

Notes

In Creative mode, items are duplicated with full data (enchantments, NBT, Shulker Box contents)
In Survival/Adventure, requires OP or cheats enabled — item data will be transferd when u use the mod 2.0.0 or higher

Requirements

Fabric Loader ≥ 0.15.0
Fabric API
Minecraft 1.21 – 1.21.11
